voice_summary_en: The Zara Instagram feed presents a sophisticated and artistic narrative, often highlighting collaborations and collections with a focus on cultural and personal stories. The brand emphasizes creativity, identity, and global fashion influences through visually rich and descriptive posts.

exemplars.caption: ZARA presents BENITO ANTONIO, a collection born in Puerto Rico and rooted in the personal world of Benito Antonio Martínez Ocasio, the places that shaped him, the instinct that has guided him, and the identity that has defined everything he creates.

ZARA AND WILLY CHAVARRIA PRESENT VATÍSIMO

A collaboration that celebrates culture, freedom of identity, and fashion global scale.

Available March 26th

Film by @allenalcantara
#zara @willychavarria

ZARA AND JOHN GALLIANO ANNOUNCE A TWO-YEAR CREATIVE PARTNERSHIP.

Zara announces a two-year creative partnership with John Galliano, who will re-author the brand’s archives through a series of seasonal collections.

ZARA presents “Le Dîner”

A quiet evening in one of Madrid’s most elegant restaurants takes an unexpected turn when a small group of strangers decides to stay for dinner. As spontaneous conversations spark and a mysterious visitor arrives, the night unfolds into an encounter none of them will soon forget.

COLOUR THEORY
This season opens with the power of primary colors. A masterclass in color play, balance, and bold combinations.

AARON LEVINE x ZARA

For this second collection, inspiration travels to remote beaches where the sun saturates garments with vivid color.

ZARA PRE-OWNED
Keeping garments in use for longer.
A platform to repair, donate, resell or buy second-hand garments.
Available in the US and selected European markets.

THE ITEM
THE COWPRINT TEXTURED COAT

A signature piece for a uniquely curated wardrobe.
Discover one new item every week.

ZARA unveils a new flagship store in Barcelona.
Designed by Belgian architect Vincent Van Duysen, the store brings the calm beauty of private interiors to the iconic Avenida Diagonal.

always_does_en: Highlights collaborations with renowned designers and artists.
Emphasizes cultural and personal storytelling in collections.
Focuses on global fashion trends and influences.
Promotes sustainability through initiatives like Zara Pre-Owned.
